name: Swordfish with Tomato and Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange tomato slices in a single layer on a large dinner plate.
Place 2 basil leaves on top. Center the swordfish over the tomatoes.
Add olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Place the remaining basil leaves on top of the fish.
Cover tightly with plastic wrap. Cook at 100% for 4 minutes.
2. Remove from oven. Pierce the plastic wrap and let stand, covered, for 2 minutes.
Uncover and serve hot.
